name: table-width-types
description: Three tables: (1) width=5000 type=dxa, (2) width=2500 type=pct (50%), (3) width=0 type=auto.
expected_behavior: Table 1: TableMeasurement { w: 5000, width_type: 'dxa' }. Table 2: TableMeasurement { w: 2500, width_type: 'pct' }. Table 3: TableMeasurement { w: 0, width_type: 'auto' }.
